rules.name: Required input completeness
rules.requiredAction: Supply every required Expansion Request field before compatibility checking.

rules.name: Existing asset resolvability
rules.requiredAction: Provide an authoritative Existing Asset ID.

rules.name: Evidence sufficiency
rules.requiredAction: Attach evidence for every declared difference.

rules.name: Phase 1 contract compliance
rules.requiredAction: Resolve the Gate-11 Phase 1 input-contract violation.

rules.name: Valid request admission
rules.requiredAction: Run the complete Gate-11 Compatibility Boundary System.
